name: You Forgot The Sauce
description:
HOW AM I SUPPOSED TO EAT MY CHICKEN NUGGIES WITHOUT ANY SAUCE!!?? HUH!!??

You had just returned home with the grub, handing Lita her half that she had given you the money for. The only problem? The dipping sauce was missing, leaving Lita livid and hangry... and she was going to get her sauce, one way or another.

Yep

Uh 2 or 3 more goon bots then back to my usual bullshit
creator: IcarusIce
